name: Texas Mineral Resources Corp.
business: Texas Mineral Resources Corp. is a mining company that owns an 18.715% membership interest in Round Top, which holds mineral leases for the Round Top rare earths project in Texas. The project is in the exploration stage and has not established any proven or probable mineral reserves. The company has no revenues and expects to incur further losses.

exposures.sentence: We are a mining company engaged in the business of owning, acquiring, exploring and developing mineral properties. Currently we own an 18.715% membership interest in Round Top, which entity holds two mineral property leases with the GLO to explore and develop a 950-acre rare earths project located in Hudspeth County, Texas, known as the Round Top Project.
